response: Hey everyone, I'm Alex. I tend to be pretty level-headed and like to think things through before jumping to conclusions—I'd rather listen first and speak second, especially when it comes to making group decisions. Looking forward to figuring this out together.

Hey everyone, I'm Logan. I'm pretty quiet and observant, and I tend to get anxious in groups, so I'll mostly listen and speak up when I have something solid to say. Looking forward to sorting this out step by step.
